digest.title: Introducing Claude Corps
digest.tldr: We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

digest.title: Anthropic apologizes for invisible Claude Fable guardrails
digest.tldr: Anthropic has apologized for stealthily throttling its new AI model, Claude Fable 5, with hidden guardrails that undermine both researchers and rivals using it to develop competing systems.  The company says it is…

digest.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
digest.tldr: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
